prompt: Watercolour painting — an ultra-wide cinematic banner (16:5). An elderly Indian man with a frail but dignified bearing sits in a wooden rocking chair, a shiny black walking stick with a brass eagle-head handle resting against it and a bright-yellow cap on his head, reading a newspaper held close to his face. Nearby, a young boy of about twelve sets up a chessboard. A small modern city flat, warm afternoon light glowing against a dark ground. Loose luminous watercolour washes, soft wet-on-wet colour bleeds, granulation and visible paper grain, glowing against the dark ground. No text, no labels.
alt: An elderly man in a rocking chair with a brass-handled walking stick and a bright yellow cap, a boy nearby setting up a chessboard
